title: Personal trainers still use spreadsheets for weekly accountability
body: I manually check every client response, update a spreadsheet, and message people one by one. It takes me hours every Sunday.

title: Bookkeeping firm manually reconciles contractor invoices
body: My operations manager manually reconciles every invoice and bank transfer in a spreadsheet. Wish there was a tool for this.

title: 3-star review: clinic intake still needs duplicate data entry
body: The product handles scheduling, but staff still re-enter insurance data by hand every day.

title: 3-star review: recurring service scheduling is still manual
body: We manually rebuild routes and call customers one by one when a recurring visit changes.
